'''ât-k-m''' ('''takama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vada|vada]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vada|vada]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-k-m
|-
! Lemma
| takama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:takamithi|takamithi]] || [[word:takamiji|takamiji]] || [[word:takamishi|takamishi]] || [[word:takami|takami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:takamuthuth|takamuthuth]] || [[word:takamujuj|takamujuj]] || [[word:takamushush|takamushush]] || [[word:takam|takam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:takamuthu|takamuthu]] || [[word:takamuju|takamuju]] || [[word:takamushu|takamushu]] || [[word:takamu|takamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:takamufuth|takamufuth]] || [[word:takamufuj|takamufuj]] || [[word:takamufush|takamufush]] || [[word:takamuf|takamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:takamethe|takamethe]] || [[word:takameje|takameje]] || [[word:takameshe|takameshe]] || [[word:takame|takame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:takamothoth|takamothoth]] || [[word:takamojoj|takamojoj]] || [[word:takamoshosh|takamoshosh]] || [[word:takam|takam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:takamotho|takamotho]] || [[word:takamojo|takamojo]] || [[word:takamosho|takamosho]] || [[word:takamo|takamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:takamofoth|takamofoth]] || [[word:takamofoj|takamofoj]] || [[word:takamofosh|takamofosh]] || [[word:takamof|takamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:takamĂŠthĂŠ|takamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:takamĂŠjĂŠ|takamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:takamĂŠshĂŠ|takamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:takamĂŠ|takamĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:takamathath|takamathath]] || [[word:takamajaj|takamajaj]] || [[word:takamashash|takamashash]] || [[word:takam|takam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:takamatha|takamatha]] || [[word:takamaja|takamaja]] || [[word:takamasha|takamasha]] || [[word:takama|takama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:takamafath|takamafath]] || [[word:takamafaj|takamafaj]] || [[word:takamafash|takamafash]] || [[word:takamaf|takamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:takamasha|takamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotakamasha|gotakamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitakamasha|gokitakamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:takamnĂŒsha|takamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotakamnknĂŒsha|gotakamnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitakamnĂŒsha|gokitakamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:takamshĂ«sha|takamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotakamnkshĂ«sha|gotakamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitakamshĂ«sha|gokitakamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:takamrosha|takamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotakamnkrosha|gotakamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitakamrosha|gokitakamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:takamusha|takamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotakamnkmusha|gotakamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitakamusha|gokitakamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:takamsherasha|takamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotakamnksherasha|gotakamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitakamsherasha|gokitakamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:takamngasha|takamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotakamnkngasha|gotakamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitakamngasha|gokitakamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:takamyasha|takamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotakamnkyasha|gotakamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitakamyasha|gokitakamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:takamyamasha|takamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotakamnkyamasha|gotakamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitakamyamasha|gokitakamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:takamnĂŒshĂ«sha|takamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotakamnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gotakamnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitakamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokitakamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:takamnĂŒrosha|takamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotakamnknĂŒrosha|gotakamnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitakamnĂŒrosha|gokitakamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:takamnĂŒmusha|takamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotakamnknĂŒmusha|gotakamnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitakamnĂŒmusha|gokitakamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:takamshĂ«nĂŒsha|takamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotakamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gotakamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitakamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokitakamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:takamshĂ«rosha|takamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotakamnkshĂ«rosha|gotakamnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitakamshĂ«rosha|gokitakamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:takamshĂ«musha|takamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotakamnkshĂ«musha|gotakamnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitakamshĂ«musha|gokitakamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:takamronĂŒsha|takamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotakamnkronĂŒsha|gotakamnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitakamronĂŒsha|gokitakamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:takamroshĂ«sha|takamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotakamnkroshĂ«sha|gotakamnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitakamroshĂ«sha|gokitakamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:takamromusha|takamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotakamnkromusha|gotakamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitakamromusha|gokitakamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:takamunĂŒsha|takamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotakamnkmunĂŒsha|gotakamnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitakamunĂŒsha|gokitakamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:takamushĂ«sha|takamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotakamnkmushĂ«sha|gotakamnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitakamushĂ«sha|gokitakamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:takamurosha|takamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotakamnkmurosha|gotakamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitakamurosha|gokitakamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:takam|takam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:tĂŠkĂŠm|tĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotakam|hotakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hotĂŠkĂŠm|hotĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotakam|hohotakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotĂŠkĂŠm|hohotĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒtakam|nĂŒtakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒtĂŠkĂŠm|nĂŒtĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒtakam|nĂŒnĂŒtakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒtĂŠkĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŒtĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻtakam|nĂŻtakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻtĂŠkĂŠm|nĂŻtĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻtakam|nĂŻnĂŻtakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻtĂŠkĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŻtĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutakam|lutakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lutĂŠkĂŠm|lutĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutakam|lulutakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutĂŠkĂŠm|lulutĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litakam|litakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:litĂŠkĂŠm|litĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitakam|lilitakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitĂŠkĂŠm|lilitĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotakam|kotakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kotĂŠkĂŠm|kotĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotakam|kokotakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotĂŠkĂŠm|kokotĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketakam|ketakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ketĂŠkĂŠm|ketĂŠkĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketakam|keketakam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketĂŠkĂŠm|keketĂŠkĂŠm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
